title: drhur: Learn R with Dr. Hu Easily and Happily
text: Learning programming language R can (rewardingly) challenging. drhur pedagogical software make learning process easier enjoyable. package includes tutorials basic data science skills R, basic R syntax, data import/export, munging, visualization. goal package provide interactive platform learners easily efficiently enter R world. ideal way acquire skills “Learning R Dr. Hu” workshop, conducted Associate Professor Yue Hu Department Political Science Tsinghua University. modules included package correspond content initial chapters workshop series Dr. Hu’s forthcoming textbook R programming language. workshop series book aim cover knowledge skills R, ranging basic advanced techniques, spatial analysis, network analysis, text analysis. can find relevant information author’s website contacting directly.

title: drhur: Learn R with Dr. Hu Easily and Happily
text: workshop self-contained Quarto Live document whose code cells run directly browser via WebAssembly (webR), learners can read instructions run exercises side side without setting local R session. One can conveniently load package open workshop drhur() function, renders document opens browser. example, data-visualization workshop can initiated following commands: Basics series currently includes six workshops: algebra, play, munging, descriptive, visual_basic, loop. available two language editions, selected lang argument—simplified Chinese ("cn", default) English ("en"): Rendering requires Quarto command-line tool installed, running interactive code cells requires internet connection (webR runtime workshop’s R packages downloaded browser view time).
code: if (!require(drhur)) install.packages("drhur") library(drhur)  # Open as a scrollable HTML live document (the default) drhur("visual_basic")  # Or open the same workshop as a reveal.js slide deck drhur("visual_basic", style = "slide") # Open the visualization workshop in English drhur("visual_basic", lang = "en")

title: drhur: Learn R with Dr. Hu Easily and Happily
text: drhur aims help R learners get touch common applied skills programming language. encourage users consult help files details. development package ongoing. Please contact us questions, bug reports, comments. Free open issue software’s GitHub page question feature request.

title: drhur: Learn R with Dr. Hu Easily and Happily
text: Yue Hu Political Science, Tsinghua Univeristy Email: yuehu@tsinghua.edu.cn Website: https://www.drhuyue.site

title: drhur: 与胡博士一起学R
text: 对很多朋友来说，学习编程语言（比如R）都将会是（伴随满足感的）挑战。 drhur 正是一款旨在使这一学习过程更加轻松愉快而研发的教学软件。 目前版本的软件内含有关于使用R进行基本数据科学技能的教程，如基础R运算、数据的导入/导出、清洗和可视化。 此软件的目标是为学习者提供一个交互式平台，让他们能够轻松且高效地融入到 R 的世界。 使用本软件的最佳方式是配合由清华大学政治学系副教授胡悦博士开设的 “Learning R Dr. Hu”工作坊共同使用。 软件中的模块实际上就是这个工作坊系列部分初期课程，也将被包含至胡博士即将出版的R语言教材。 工作坊和即将出版的教材覆盖了有关R从基础到高级的技术（如空间分析、网络分析以及文本分析）的大量知识和技能。 您可以在作者的网站上或通过直接联系他获取更多相关信息。

title: drhur: 与胡博士一起学R
text: 本软件包的每个工作坊都是一个自包含的 Quarto Live 文档，其中的代码单元通过 WebAssembly（webR）直接在浏览器中运行。学习者无需配置本地 R 环境，便可一边阅读讲解、一边运行练习。您可以方便地通过 drhur() 函数打开某个工作坊：该函数会渲染文档并在浏览器中打开它。比如，您可以通过以下命令来启动数据可视化工作坊： 《基础》系列目前包含六个工作坊：algebra、play、munging、descriptive、visual_basic 和 loop。每个工作坊都提供两种语言版本，通过 lang 参数选择——简体中文（"cn"，默认）和英文（"en"）： 渲染需要预先安装 Quarto 命令行工具；运行交互式代码单元则需要联网（webR 运行时及工作坊所需的 R 包会在浏览时于浏览器中下载）。
code: if (!require(drhur)) install.packages("drhur") library(drhur)  # 以可滚动的 HTML 实时文档形式打开（默认） drhur("visual_basic")  # 或将同一工作坊以 reveal.js 幻灯片形式打开 drhur("visual_basic", style = "slide") # 以英文版打开可视化工作坊 drhur("visual_basic", lang = "en")

title: drhur: 与胡博士一起学R
text: drhur 的目标是帮助学习者掌握该编程语言的常用应用技巧。 我们鼓励用户查阅帮助文件以获取更多详细信息。 另外，此软件仍在开发中。 如果您有任何问题、发现任何错误或者有任何评论，可以在软件的 GitHub 页面上提出问题。

title: drhur: 与胡博士一起学R
text: 胡悦 清华大学政治学系， Email: yuehu@tsinghua.edu.cn 网站: https://www.drhuyue.site

title: Learning R with Dr. Hu
text: drhur pedagogical software makes R learners’ lives little easier happier, supplementary courseware Dr. Yue Hu’s R lectures. workshops crystallized Dr. Hu’s online offline R workshops. version 2.0.0, workshop self-contained Quarto Live document: code cells run directly browser via WebAssembly (webR), learners read instructions run exercises side side without setting local R session.

title: Learning R with Dr. Hu
text: Opening workshop requires Quarto command-line tool installed.
code: # Latest release from CRAN install.packages("drhur")  # Development version remotes::install_github("sammo3182/drhur")  # Or the WebAssembly-ready build from R-universe install.packages("drhur", repos = "https://sammo3182.r-universe.dev")

title: Learning R with Dr. Hu
text: function renders workshop serves local web server, opens browser. (Quarto Live cells rely browser features disabled files opened directly disk, document served http://localhost rather opened file.) Available workshops (Basics series): algebra, play, munging, descriptive, visual_basic, loop. Use lang = "en" English editions lang = "cn" (default) Chinese ones.
code: library(drhur)  # Open a workshop as a scrollable HTML live document (the default) drhur("algebra")  # ...or as a reveal.js slide deck drhur("algebra", style = "slide")

title: Learning R with Dr. Hu

what: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
text: function renders self-contained Quarto Live document workshop materials shipped package opens browser. workshop interactive document whose code cells run browser via WebAssembly (webR); local R session required run exercises. workshop list continually updated along R workshop Dr. Hu.

title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
code: drhur(   workshop,   lang = "cn",   style = "document",   output_dir = tempdir(),   quiet = FALSE )

title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
text: workshop character string naming workshop open. See details available workshops. lang character string giving display language: simplified Chinese ("cn", default) English ("en"). style character string choosing output style: "document" (default) renders scrollable Quarto Live HTML document (live-html); "slide" renders reveal.js slide deck (live-revealjs). output_dir Directory workshop rendered. Defaults per-session temporary directory. installed package files never modified. quiet Logical; suppress Quarto's rendering output. Defaults FALSE.

title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
text: (Invisibly) path rendered HTML file.

title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
text: workshops available current version (Basics   series): algebra: Basic maths, vectors, matrices R syntax. play: Basic data structures; inputting, outputting, creating data. munging: Generalizing extracting data frames (sorting, summarizing, selecting, mutating). descriptive: Describing variables data, including summary tables distribution plots. visual_basic: Presenting variables, patterns, estimates visualization tools. loop: Conditionals, loops, batch processing. Every workshop ships two language editions, selected lang: simplified Chinese ("cn", default) English ("en"). Rendering requires Quarto command-line tool installed. Running interactive code cells rendered document additionally requires internet connection, webR runtime workshop's R packages downloaded browser view time. Quarto Live cells run OJS webR, browsers disable documents opened directly disk (file://), workshop served local web server rather opened file. serving step uses servr package, suggested dependency; install install.packages("servr") prompted. interactive session server started background (R console stays free) remains available rest session; stop servr::daemon_stop().

title: Calling for a Workshop in Dr Hu's R Workshop — drhur
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Open the algebra workshop as an HTML live document (Chinese, the default) drhur("algebra")  # Open the same workshop in English drhur("algebra", lang = "en")  # Open the data-munging workshop as a slide deck drhur("munging", style = "slide") } # }

title: drhur 2.0.0
text: Switched workshops learnr Shiny tutorials self-contained Quarto Live documents. Code cells now run browser via WebAssembly (webR); local R session needed run exercises. style: "document" (default, scrollable live-html document) "slide" (live-revealjs deck). lang: "cn" (default) "en". Refreshed Basics workshops: algebra, play, munging, descriptive, visual_basic, loop.

title: drhur 2.0.0
text: Removed dependency learnr; added quarto (Imports) servr (Suggests, used serve workshop locally). Quarto command-line tool now system requirement.
